♥ about gals who

our story

a support network founded by women, run by women, for women.

since
2019
our story

empowering women through every chapter of life

gals who is a community, founded in 2019, dedicated to empowering women as they navigate different chapters of their life.

Through regular community events, trips around the world and our closed Facebook groups consisting of thousands of girls, we are here to support through renting, travelling, graduating, dating, reading and even sweating!

Join the CommunityShop the merch →

gals only trips a year

the community

we have you covered...

gals who graduate 🎓
